chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ نُوحٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF NOAH<sup>as</sup> ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 280)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 280)
text: الْغَبَرَةُ عَلَى مَنْ أَثَارَهَا هَلَكَ الْمَحَاضِيرُ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ وَ مَا الْمَحَاضِيرُ قَالَ الْمُسْتَعْجِلُونَ أَمَا إِنَّهُمْ لَنْ يُرِيدُوا إِلَّا مَنْ يَعْرِضُ لَهُمْ ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا أَبَا الْمُرْهِفِ أَمَا إِنَّهُمْ لَمْ يُرِيدُوكُمْ بِمُجْحِفَةٍ إِلَّا عَرَضَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُمْ بِشَاغِلٍ ثُمَّ نَكَتَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ (عليه السلام) فِي الْأَرْضِ ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا أَبَا الْمُرْهِفِ قُلْتُ لَبَّيْكَ قَالَ أَ تَرَى قَوْماً حَبَسُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ عَلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ ذِكْرُهُ لَا يَجْعَلُ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ فَرَجاً بَلَى وَ اللَّهِ لَيَجْعَلَنَّ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ فَرَجاً.

en.hubeali: H 14859 – A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Hafs Bin Aasim, from Sayf Al-tammaar, from Abu Al-Murhaf, who has narrated the following:

Abu Ja’farasws said: The dust will be upon the one who raises it. Destroyed are the ‘الْمَحَاضِيرُ’ Mahazeyr!’ I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for youasws, and who are the Mahazeyr?’ Heasws said: ‘The hasty ones. But, they do not want anyone except for the one who duels with them’.

Then (Imam<sup>asws</sup>) said: ‘O Abu Al-Murhaf, if they want you to suffer a calamity, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> will Grab them by some kind of entanglement’. Then Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> tapped on the ground, then said: ‘O Abu Al-Murhaf!’ I said, ‘Here I am (to obey)!’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do you see a people who have restricted themselves for the sake of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> that He<sup>azwj</sup> will not Make a way out for them? Yes, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, He<sup>azwj</sup> will (always) Make a way out for them’.
en.sarwar: 412. A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Hafs Bin Aasim, from Sayf Al-tammaar, from Abu Al-Murhaf, who has narrated the following: Abu Ja’far (a.s.) said: The dust will be upon the one who raises it. Destroyed are the ‘الْمَحَاضِيرُ’ Mahazeyr!’ I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you (a.s.), and who are the Mahazeyr?’ He (a.s.) said: ‘The hasty ones. But, they do not want anyone except for the one who duels with them’. Then (Imam (a.s.)) said: ‘O Abu Al-Murhaf, if they want you to suffer a calamity, Allah (azwj) will Grab them by some kind of entanglement’. Then Abu Ja’far (a.s.) tapped on the ground, then said: ‘O Abu Al-Murhaf!’ I said, ‘Here I am (to obey)!’ He (a.s.) said: ‘Do you see a people who have restricted themselves for the sake of Allah (azwj) that He (azwj) will not Make a way out for them? Yes, by Allah (azwj), He (azwj) will (always) Make a way out for them’.
